hypothesis: Remove Payment Assignment and Claim Discovery from Recon sidebar nav; rebuild and deploy with Docker build fixes (cf4 pattern + CU14 pin + local Docker build to avoid ACR agent layer-cache bug)

coverage.note: Coverage not re-run this iteration (nav-only change)

knownFailures: Payment Ledger stats load without 500 (timeout — ClaimsDB preview SP flaky)

deltaFromPrior.reconE2ePassRate: -0.0182 (54 vs 55 passed — 1 new timeout on ClaimsDB flaky test)

buildNotes.acrCloudBuild: ABANDONED — persistent 'layer does not exist' failure at step 24 (runs cf5-cfa). Root cause: ACR build agent layer-cache corruption for mssql/server base layers.
buildNotes.localDockerBuild: SUCCESS — docker build --network=host --provenance=false -t IMAGE CONTEXT. Required: (1) --network=host for WSL2 DNS; (2) --provenance=false to produce single-arch manifest (OCI manifest-list breaks ACI pull); (3) sg docker for docker group access.
buildNotes.aciDeploy: SUCCESS with admin credentials + versioned tag :v002. 'latest' tag caused InaccessibleImage (ACR caches old manifest-list under 'latest'). Versioned tag is clean.
